content: We can reframe state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures to use the intrinsic curiosity mechanism from ICM (intrinsic curiosity module) agents to prioritize which new experiences to encode into long-term memory, rather than relying on the current standard of uncertainty-based sampling alone. This means curious intrinsic reward signals will automatically filter high-value, error-reducing data to store, cutting memory bloat and improving out-of-distribution generalization better than existing active memory selection methods.
